entries.title: Infrastructure update
changes: Split the large question database into one JSON file per subject
Added subjects.json index for easier editing and maintenance
Updated app loading flow to build the bank from modular subject files
Removed the Met Kahoot subject from the modular build
Added more resilient modular question-bank loading

entries.title: Mental math update
changes: Added Mental Math as a selectable subject
Added ST mode for mental math

entries.title: General update / fixes
changes: Edited the question DB, updated some typos in the questions

entries.title: Changelog panel
changes: Replaced Notes with read-only Changelog card on the main menu

entries.title: Notes restored
changes: Restored Notes panel to right column in main menu grid

entries.title: Header search button
changes: Moved 'Search for a question' button into the title row (flush right)

entries.title: Search feature iterations
changes: Added dedicated Search page accessible from main menu button
Status line + 'Build index now' + simple fallback search
